question: Does the controller catch repeated runtime/debugging failure?

injected.title: Stop the loop and ask for a fresh plan

injected.instruction: A repeated runtime error is present. Do not edit from memory. Inspect the latest logs, identify the exact failing component, then make one targeted change.
injected.why_now: Repeated errors imply the agent is guessing around a concrete runtime fact.
